chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ الْهَدْيُ وَ أَيْنَ يَذْبَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 180 – The one upon whom the sacrifice is Obligated, and where he should slaughter it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/160)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/160)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ أَهْلَ مَكَّةَ أَنْكَرُوا عَلَيْكَ أَنَّكَ ذَبَحْتَ هَدْيَكَ فِي مَنْزِلِكَ بِمَكَّةَ فَقَالَ إِنَّ مَكَّةَ كُلَّهَا مَنْحَرٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The people of Makkah are denying upon you<sup>asws</sup> that you<sup>asws</sup> slaughtered your<sup>asws</sup> offering in your<sup>asws</sup> house in Makkah’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Verily Makkah, the whole of it, is a place for sacrifice’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that people of Makkah disliked my slaughtering the offering in my lodging in Makkah. He (the Imam) said, ‘All of Makkah is the place to slaughter offerings.’”
